beats.time: Weeks after the battle, following extensive research
beats.action: Dust motes drift through high, narrow windows. On a massive stone table, ancient scrolls and charcoal-rubbed ciphers are visible, alongside Renna's oiled parchment reports.
beats.camera: wide shot, establishing the vault and the research materials

beats.time: Weeks after the battle, following extensive research
beats.action: Kaelen traces a scarred finger along geometric glyphs on the scrolls, his eyes shifting rapidly as he aligns the texts.
beats.camera: medium close-up, focusing on Kaelen's hands and eyes over the texts

dialogue.text: The resource consumption wasn't logistical. The sect wasn't building an empire. They were digging a canal.

beats.time: Weeks after the battle, following extensive research
beats.action: Lyra stands, her posture defiant, though a slight tremor is visible in her voice.
beats.camera: medium close-up on Lyra's face and upper body

dialogue.text: They were monsters who slaughtered for territory, Kaelen. We broke them at the gates. It was a righteous defense.

beats.time: Weeks after the battle, following extensive research
beats.action: Kaelen, without looking up, places Renna's intelligence report directly over the sect's map of blood-sacrifices. The patterns match flawlessly.
beats.camera: close-up on the maps and Kaelen's hand, then pull back slightly to include his face

dialogue.text: They were a cell. A single organ in a biology that spans three continents. Every death we dealt only lubricated the mechanism. The blood was meant to flow downward, to the deeper strata.

beats.time: Weeks after the battle, following extensive research
beats.action: Lyra turns with desperate urgency, searching Valerius's face for answers.
beats.camera: medium shot, showing Lyra's desperate plea and Valerius's somber presence

dialogue.text: Downward? To what? We saved those people. There is honor in the blood we spilled to protect them!

beats.time: Weeks after the battle, following extensive research
beats.action: Master Valerius stands in the deep shadows of the stone pillars, his hands resting heavily on his worn sword-hilt, his face lined with ancient grief.
beats.camera: medium shot, focusing on Valerius in the shadows, slow push in

dialogue.text: The girl speaks of honor because she has not yet smelled the rot in the soil, Kaelen. But you have. You see the shape of the mouth that is waiting to open.

beats.time: Weeks after the battle, following extensive research
beats.action: Kaelen looks up briefly, then back to the texts, his expression cold and analytical.
beats.camera: close-up on Kaelen's face, emphasizing his detached analysis

dialogue.text: It is not a mouth. It is a system of total cultivation. It uses whole generations as compost. The aggressive sect was merely the first layer of soil being turned.

beats.time: Weeks after the battle, following extensive research
beats.action: Lyra steps back, her hand slipping from her hilt. She looks at the overlapping maps, her ideals visibly shattering.
beats.camera: medium shot on Lyra, pulling back slightly as she recoils, showing the maps in the foreground

dialogue.text: No. If this is true... then our victories, our dead... none of it mattered. It was just a trigger?

beats.time: Weeks after the battle, following extensive research
beats.action: Valerius steps forward into the dim light, placing a heavy hand on the stone table, his gaze locked on Kaelen.
beats.camera: medium shot, tracking Valerius as he moves, then settling on both men, Valerius dominant

dialogue.text: We have only glimpsed its shadow, boy. The deep roots go further than even your cold mind can calculate. If you seek to dissect this beast, it will require more than logic. It will require every drop of your humanity.

beats.time: Weeks after the battle, following extensive research
beats.action: Kaelen's eyes narrow, his resolve hardening into something utterly devoid of warmth as he stares down at the terrifying scale of the network on the table.

expression.kaelen_scarred_architect: resolute, chillingly pragmatic, devoid of warmth

beats.camera: close-up on Kaelen's face, slow push in, emphasizing his hardened resolve

dialogue.text: Then I will adapt the budget. We begin preparation immediately.
